---
title: "Admin and service"
subtitle: "Academic citizenship, editorial work, organisation and teaching"
---

## Professional service

- Associate Editor, **Environmetrics**.
- Associate Editor, **Journal of the Royal Statistical Society, Series C**.
- Meeting Secretary, Environmental Statistics Section, Royal Statistical Society (2022-25).
- Chair, International Environmetrics Society Outreach and Liaison Committee (2023-2025).
- Elected Member, International Statistical Institute.

## Event organisation and networks

- Co-founder, **GLE²N: Glasgow--Edinburgh Extremes Network**, a network for applied, theoretical and methodological work in statistical risk analysis and extreme value theory. [Link here](https://glen-scotland.github.io/glen/)
- Organiser, **INLA: Past, Present, and Future** biannual workshops. [Link here](https://inla-workshop.github.io/INLA-PastPresentFuture/)
- Co-organiser, **EnvEcoStats**, environmental and ecological statistics conference.  [Link here](https://lancasterextremes.co.uk/)).
<!-- - Organiser/co-organiser of invited sessions on extremes, environmental statistics and statistical risk. -->

## Grants

- **GEOBEx: Geostatistical Binary Models for Extremes**. EPSRC-funded project in collaboration with Carolina Euan, Lancaster University.
- **Predict4Resilience beta phase**. Funded by the Office for Gas and Electricity Markets, in collaboration with Scottish Power, SIA Partners and the Met Office.
- **Improving landslide hazard assessment in Scotland**. Funded by the Scottish Government through the National Centre for Resilience, with the British Geological Survey and the University of Twente.

## University roles

- Exam Officer for Statistics (2022-25).
- Member of School of Mathematics & Statistics EDI committee.
- Academic adviser of studies for MSc students.
- Teaching across probability, statistics and statistical programming.

## Teaching

Recent teaching has included:

- **STATS4047 / STATS5022: Principles of Probability and Statistics**
- **STATS5103: Introduction to Statistical Programming in R and Python**
